messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- T: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Botswana's former president Festus Mogae dies at 86 - Reuters
    Summary: Botswana's former president Festus Mogae dies at 86 Reuters

[1] Title: Trump says he would not pay $1,000 to watch US at World Cup - Al Jazeera
    Summary: Trump says he would not pay $1,000 to watch US at World Cup Al Jazeera

[2] Title: FIFA triples best available World Cup final ticket to $33K - ESPN
    Summary: FIFA triples best available World Cup final ticket to $33K ESPN

[3] Title: Philip Caputo, Who Wrote Blistering Vietnam War Memoir, Dies at 84 - nytimes.com
    Summary: Philip Caputo, Who Wrote Blistering Vietnam War Memoir, Dies at 84 nytimes.com

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Obituary of foreign political leader has no connection to telecom or growth positions."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Trump's personal World Cup opinion is irrelevant to portfolio positions."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "FIFA ticket pricing news has no relevance to stock positions."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Author obituary has no connection to portfolio holdings."
  }
]
```
